rationale.R1.5: The revised draft improves the order of presentation, addressing forward references and making the text more coherent.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is marked for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but not consistently throughout the text.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is mostly within scope with minor drifts in some sections.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is a concern due to the lack of explicit statements on removing self-preference drift.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are generally good, but some minor edits are not annotated.
